testcase.name: should pass basic test
renders the app without crashing
renders with Redux Provider
renders with QueryClientProvider
renders with ThemeProvider and CssBaseline
shows loading fallback for lazy components
renders Toaster component
applies theme mode from store
initializes QueryClient with correct options
exports App as default
does not fetch when modal is closed
does not fetch when username is null
shows loading spinner while fetching
displays username in dialog title
displays sessions when fetched successfully
shows Current chip for the current session
shows no sessions message when list is empty
shows error alert when fetch fails
shows generic error message for non-Error exception
terminates a non-current session
shows error when terminate fails
calls onClose when Close button is clicked
fetches sessions when modal opens with a username
clears sessions and errors when modal is closed
shows browser and OS info when available
renders phone icon for mobile device sessions
renders tablet icon for tablet device sessions
handles sessions with invalid datetime strings without crashing

should not render modal when closed
should load and display client details
should handle loading error
should handle response without data
should toggle client secret visibility
should copy client ID to clipboard

should display form data values

should enable client ID when clientIdReadOnly is false

should handle dark mode case

should create singleton service instances

testcase.classname: Services Index Exports > API Client Exports
testcase.name: should export userManagementApi

testcase.classname: Services Index Exports > API Client Exports
testcase.name: should export authServerApi

testcase.classname: Services Index Exports > API Client Exports
testcase.name: should export API clients as objects with methods
should have all expected exports
should export at least 10 items
should allow creating new instances of services
should have different instances when creating new services
should have correct grant type values
should contain all expected grant types
should have correct auth method values
should contain all expected auth methods
should have correct status values
should contain all expected status values

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > Type compatibility
testcase.name: should allow valid GrantType values

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > Type compatibility
testcase.name: should allow valid AuthMethod values

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > Type compatibility
testcase.name: should allow valid ClientStatus values

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > RegisteredClientDetails interface
testcase.name: should accept valid client details with required fields

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > RegisteredClientDetails interface
testcase.name: should accept client details with optional fields

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > RegisteredClientDetails interface
testcase.name: should accept scopes as both array and Set

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > ClientFormData interface
testcase.name: should accept valid form data

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > ClientFormData interface
testcase.name: should accept form data with optional fields

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > ClientListItem interface
testcase.name: should accept valid list item with required fields

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > ClientListItem interface
testcase.name: should accept list item with optional fields

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > BaseResponse interface
testcase.name: should accept valid base response

testcase.classname: client.ts types and constants > BaseResponse interface
testcase.name: should accept response without optional data field
should return error message from Error instance
should return error message for different operation types

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Create operation
testcase.name: should return 400 message for create with invalid data

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Create operation
testcase.name: should return 401 message for create unauthorized

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Create operation
testcase.name: should return 403 message for create forbidden

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Create operation
testcase.name: should return 409 message for create conflict

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Create operation
testcase.name: should return 500 message for create server error

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Update operation
testcase.name: should return 400 message for update with invalid data

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Update operation
testcase.name: should return 404 message for update not found

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Delete operation
testcase.name: should return 400 message for delete with invalid request

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Delete operation
testcase.name: should return 404 message for delete not found

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Fetch operation
testcase.name: should return 400 message for fetch with invalid request

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Fetch operation
testcase.name: should return 401 message for fetch unauthorized

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Fetch operation
testcase.name: should return 403 message for fetch forbidden

testcase.classname: accountErrorUtils > getAccountErrorMessage > Status code handling - Fetch operation
testcase.name: should return 404 message for fetch not found
should use custom messages when provided
should fall back to default when custom message not found
should override default messages with custom ones
should return fallback message for unknown status code
should return fallback message for update operation
should return fallback message for delete operation
should return fallback message for fetch operation
should handle null error
should handle undefined error
should handle string error
should handle number error
should handle object without status
should have valid type definitions (compile-time check)
should export UserStatus enum values
should export AccountStatus enum values
should export ClientStatus enum values
should export ApprovalType enum values
should export ApprovalStatus enum values
should allow creating User objects with correct types
should allow creating Role objects with correct types
should allow creating Scope objects with correct types
should allow creating Account objects with correct types
should allow creating OAuthClient objects with correct types

should handle checkbox changes
should clear field error when user starts typing
should not call setErrors if field has no error
should handle textarea changes
should handle select changes
should preserve other form data when updating a field
should handle unchecking a checkbox
should render modal when open
should not render when open is false
should return null when account is null
should display account ID
should display account name
should display parent ID
should display status as chip
should display all assigned roles
should display message when no roles assigned
should display created by information
should display creation date
should display updated by information
should call onClose when Close button is clicked
should display hierarchy information for child accounts
should not display hierarchy information for root accounts
should display status meanings
should handle missing optional fields
should render different status colors
should handle invalid date formats
should display N/A for undefined dates
should render all section headers
should handle undefined parent ID
should handle undefined roles array
should not render when open is false
should render when open is true
should display user information
should render AccountRoleSelector component
should render account role selector after initialization
should handle user data fetch error gracefully
should handle null user
should allow entering notes
should call onClose when Cancel button is clicked
should call onClose on dialog close
should render content after initialization
should have placeholder text in notes field
should retain notes field state across renders
should display user first and last name
should display username in parentheses
should handle user data fetch errors
should have Update Assignments button enabled
should have Cancel button enabled
should display account circle icon
should submit form with account role changes
should call onSuccess callback on successful submission
should update notes field value
should initialize with loading state
should handle null user gracefully
should handle API response without data property
should show success snackbar on successful update
renders login page with title
renders authorization server description
renders sign in button
renders instruction text
calls authService.initiateLogin when sign in button is clicked
shows loading state when login is in progress
disables button during loading
handles login failure
handles non-Error exceptions
displays error from URL query parameters
displays error description from URL
prefers error_description over error code
does not display error alert when no error in URL
displays error from Redux store
shows error alert with severity
shows login icon when not loading
shows progress indicator when loading
applies gradient background
button has appropriate role and name
error alert is accessible
redirects to dashboard immediately when already authenticated
does not redirect when not authenticated
redirects to dashboard when another tab logs in (storage event with new token)
does not redirect when another tab removes the token (logout event)
ignores storage events for unrelated keys
should not render when account is null
renders when open with all account details
should render without parentId
should render without roles
should render status chips for different statuses
displays confirmation warning
displays precautionary checklist
calls onClose when cancel is clicked
successfully deletes account and calls callbacks
displays loading state during deletion
handles error from API response
handles 400 error
handles 401 error
handles 403 error
handles 404 error
handles 409 error
handles 500 error
handles Error object
clears error when close icon is clicked
clears error state when dialog closes
prevents closing dialog during deletion
